fields.cpu_parity: 4 of 5 basic_v1 prompts full-budget token+text parity vs llama.cpp 5d56eff plain-Q8 kernels; translate-de to its recorded 7-token CPU frontier (knife-edge near-tie, top-2 logit gap 0.0226 of ~24.6; camelid GPU and the oracle agree on the other branch)
fields.gpu_parity: all 5 basic_v1 prompts full-budget token-identical on the Metal GPU-resident runtime
fields.distributed_parity: TCP layer-sharding (split 19/42) token-identical to the oracle; fail-closed guards green
fields.api_smoke: non-streaming + SSE chat via CAMELID_GEMMA4_SERVE; typed multimodal rejection; no marker/channel leakage
fields.decode_perf: warm CPU decode 75.5ms/step avg over 19 steps (attention 12.2ms + ffn+ple 52.9ms + output-proj 8.2ms + embed 2.2ms); prior recorded baseline ~6.75 tok/s steady-state — chunked-row GEMV; RSS in perf-warm log

claim_boundary: Exact-row text-token generation within the checked basic_v1 prompt pack and API smoke envelope only. No bounded-context promotion, no performance claim beyond the raw logs, no multimodal input (fails closed with a typed error), no neighboring-row or Gemma-family support, no shared-memory claim (distributed mode is layer sharding).
